raw.message:
DIE ZEIT wird 80!
Wir feiern mit einer besonderen Verlosung.

hook.summary: Colorful dots assemble into the number 80 to celebrate an anniversary giveaway.
hook.visual_action: Multi-colored dots move from a scattered state to form the number 80 against a black background.
hook.text_overlay: DIE ZEIT Jubiläums-Gewinnspiel Wir verschenken monatlich 8 digitale Jahresabonnements

scene_flow: Scattered colorful dots appear below text announcing a giveaway for DIE ZEIT.
The dots animate inward to form the number 80, representing the anniversary year.
A white call-to-action button 'Jetzt teilnehmen' appears next to the number.
The dots scatter back into a random pattern as the loop resets.
audience_proxy: German-speaking professionals and intellectuals interested in news and digital subscriptions.
